facilities.name: Emergency & Trauma Care
facilities.description: 24/7 emergency services with dedicated trauma bays, rapid response teams, and advanced life support equipment.

facilities.name: Intensive Care Unit (ICU)
facilities.description: 50-bed ICU with advanced monitoring, ventilator support, and round-the-clock critical care specialists.

facilities.name: Advanced Diagnostic Laboratory
facilities.description: Full-service pathology lab with automated analyzers for blood, urine, microbiology, and histopathology tests. Results available online.

facilities.name: Radiology & Imaging
facilities.description: State-of-the-art 3T MRI, 128-slice CT, digital X-ray, ultrasound, mammography, and nuclear medicine.

facilities.name: Pharmacy
facilities.description: 24-hour in-house pharmacy stocked with a comprehensive range of medicines, medical supplies, and OTC products.

facilities.name: Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation
facilities.description: Modern rehab center offering physiotherapy, occupational therapy, speech therapy, and cardiac rehabilitation.

facilities.name: Blood Bank
facilities.description: Fully automated blood bank with component therapy facilities, available 24/7 for emergencies.

facilities.name: Cafeteria & Nutrition Services
facilities.description: Patient-friendly cafeteria offering balanced meals, diet-specific menus, and visitor dining.

facilities.name: Ambulance Services
facilities.description: Fleet of Advanced Life Support (ALS) and Basic Life Support (BLS) ambulances available 24/7.

facilities.name: Health Checkup Packages
facilities.description: Comprehensive health checkup packages for all age groups including Basic, Executive, and Comprehensive packages.

faqs.question: What are the visiting hours?
faqs.answer: Visiting hours are 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM and 05:00 PM - 07:00 PM daily. ICU visits are restricted to 15 minutes twice daily.

faqs.question: Is parking available?
faqs.answer: Yes, free parking is available for 300+ vehicles in our basement and multi-level car park adjacent to the hospital.

faqs.question: Can I book appointments online?
faqs.answer: Yes! Use the Appointment Scheduling section in this app to book, reschedule, or cancel appointments.

faqs.question: Are cashless insurance facilities available?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have cashless tie-ups with 10+ major insurance providers. Please visit our insurance desk on Ground Floor, Block I.

faqs.question: Do you have a 24-hour pharmacy?
faqs.answer: Yes, our in-house pharmacy near the main entrance is open 24 hours, 7 days a week.
